summary: Implemented a Hyprland compositor adapter for madobe-owned headless outputs with create, configure, park, idempotent remove, list, bind, and reconcile behavior through the existing mockable hyprctl command boundary. Live Hyprland 0.55.2 evidence confirms a named output was created, configured, parked off-session, and removed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: A named remote output can be created on the Linux host.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m1-remote-output-lifecycle/hyprland-monitors-after-create.json shows madobe-qd-m1-remote-output-lifecycle at 1280x720@60 and 50000x50000; commands.log records output create and eval configuration status=0.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Output can be parked without disrupting the developer session.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m1-remote-output-lifecycle/hyprland-monitors-after-park.json shows the named output at 640x480@30 and 50000x50000 while DP-2 and DP-3 remain present.
HyprlandAdapter::remove_output checks monitor state before removal and returns Ok when absent; adapter_lifecycle test calls remove_output twice. Live after-remove JSON shows the named output absent.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Restart or stale-output reconciliation behavior is typed and tested.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: crates/hyprland/tests/adapter_lifecycle.rs asserts ReconcileReport { created: 1, parked: 1 } when a desired output is missing and a stale madobe output exists.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Hardware evidence includes command logs and Hyprland state before and after lifecycle operations.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m1-remote-output-lifecycle/commands.log, host-env.txt, hyprland-monitors-before.json, hyprland-workspaces-before.json, hyprland-monitors-after-create.json, hyprland-monitors-after-park.json, and hyprland-monitors-after-remove.json.

commandsRun.evidence: Terminal output: fmt, taplo, cargo check, clippy, typos, markdownlint, actionlint, and line-count gates passed.
evidence/m1-remote-output-lifecycle/commands.log; orchestrator rerun after rebase passed with 24 nextest tests, doc tests passed, and Apple tests skipped outside macOS.

commandsRun.command: hyprctl lifecycle evidence script using HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE=<redacted>

residualRisks: The adapter is validated on the reference Hyprland 0.55.2 Lua config path. Older legacy-parser Hyprland behavior was not live-tested.
Binding uses Hyprland moveworkspacetomonitor through the command boundary and is unit-tested only; this node's live evidence focused on output lifecycle.
